parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets clk and rst logic threshold

parameters.name: target
parameters.override_behavior: sets initial, reset, and zero-error trim target

parameters.name: deadband
parameters.override_behavior: sets the symmetric no-update error interval

parameters.name: step_size
parameters.override_behavior: sets trim increment or decrement per accepted update

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic rising-edge sampled state updates.
Do not use current contributions, transistor-level devices, AC/noise analysis, or validation side channels.

properties.observable_contract: Out initializes to target and returns to target while rst is above vth; metric is low during reset.
At a rising clock crossing with vin minus target greater than deadband, out increases by one step_size and metric goes high.
At a rising clock crossing with vin minus target less than negative deadband, out decreases by one step_size and metric goes high.
At a rising clock crossing with signed error inside the inclusive deadband, out holds and metric remains low.
Repeated updates cannot drive out below vmin or above vmax.
Out state does not follow vin between rising clock crossings.

title: Calibration Deadband Controller
